name: Brigand Night Raid
description: Desperate bandits attack the refugee camp under cover of darkness!

refugee_camp_defended.display_message: The brigands flee into the night! Among their possessions, you find an ancient key marked with strange runes.

ambient_description: Firelight flickers across the camp as brigands charge from the darkness. Refugees scramble for cover as steel clashes.
victory_description: The brigands retreat, leaving their leader's body behind. The refugees emerge from hiding, cheering your victory. Marta thanks you and hands you a strange key found on the bandit leader—an ancient artifact he must have stolen from the ruins.
defeat_description: Overwhelmed, you fall back as the brigands loot the camp. The refugees scatter into the night.
